## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behaviour change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling / config

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `feat/...`, `fix/...`, etc.
- [ ] Commits use Conventional Commit format
- [ ] `dotnet build` succeeds locally
- [ ] No new dependencies in `SportMap.Core` (Clean Architecture rule)
- [ ] API changes are reflected in `docs/api-specification.md`
- [ ] README updated if setup steps changed
